creator: lucas.kanashiro@collabora.com
text:
Created attachment 198354
Patch sysutils/py-google-compute-engine to version 2.8.6

The latest upstream version of sysutils/py-google-compute-engine (aka 2.8.6) has some new features that we need to build GCE cloud images. We also need to update sysutils/google-compute-engine-oslogin to version 1.3.1.
